case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 60-120s checkoutservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+1.6 and cpu dev=+1.5 persist. Traces show internal latency spikes (SendOrderConfirmation p99 +2.2) confirming latency as root cause over cpu. Ranking remains checkoutservice_latency.
